productDisplayName: Puma Men Grey Madison Classic Shoes
description: Style Note puma has its roots in Germany, and the brand is known for its minimalist design in high-end athletic footwear. Crafted in the brand's signature style, these shoes are the right solution for brand conscious comfort junkies. This Madison Classic shoe is a great foot style option if you're looking for something that combines, form, fashion and rough use. Product Details Leather and other materials upper with perforations and two straps at the forefoot with Velcro closure Padded collar and fabric inner for comfort Upper adhered to the outsole Thick rubber outsole with patterned grooves Material and Care Synthetic, leather Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight Remove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
